app.title: General Translation Demo
app.subtitle: Localization POC
app.description: This app uses i18next for runtime translations and General Translation to generate locale files.
app.headline: Headline example
app.headLineParagraph: Short paragraphs like this are useful for testing translated copy in a realistic layout.
app.callToActionParagraph: Buttons, form fields, and supporting text can all be translated without changing the structure of the page.
